title: Leather Bundle Recipe
description: Adds the missing recipe for the bundle with the same items as the 1.21.2 version
body:
Do you want to use the bundles but are stuck in a version that does not offer the option to craft them?

Fear no more! This mod implements the new recipe that was added in the 1.21.2 version.

For quality of life, I also recommend installing [Bundle Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-scroll).
